P

peek() - Method in class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.TablePile
Returns the top card of the pile (the last card played) without removing it.
playCard(int, int) - Method in interface com.trifasico.x50zo.model.players.IPlayer
Plays the card at the given hand index onto the table.
playCard(int, int) - Method in class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.players.PlayerAdapter
Plays the card at the given hand index onto the table.
PlayerAdapter - Class in com.trifasico.x50zo.model.players
Adapter class that provides a complete default implementation of IPlayer for any Cincuentazo player.
PlayerAdapter(String) - Constructor for class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.players.PlayerAdapter
Constructs an PlayerAdapter with the given name and an empty hand.
playSelectedCard(int, int) - Method in class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.players.HumanPlayer
Plays the card at cardIndex from the human's hand.
push(Card) - Method in class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.TablePile
Places a card on top of the pile and updates the running sum.
